title: boswellia integra
intro: Boswellia integra, also known as Indian frankincense, is a plant species within the Burseraceae family, native to the Indian subcontinent. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which are attributed to the presence of boswellic acids. The health benefits of Boswellia integra include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Boswellia integra is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be obtained from various health food stores or online retailers.
